            # Write stream activity with a future timestamp to guarantee freshness

            _future_ts = (
                __import__('datetime').datetime.now(__import__('datetime').timezone.utc)

    def test_new_job_after_terminal_not_duplicate(self):
        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
            staging = Path(tmp)
            job_id = "phase-fault-dup-002"
            ws = staging / job_id / "_background" / "bg-done"
            ws.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            _atomic_write_json(ws / "run-state.json", {
                "status": "completed",
                "job_id": job_id,
                "run_id": "bg-done",
                "created_at": _iso_now(),
            })
            is_dup, _ = check_duplicate_job(staging, job_id)
            self.assertFalse(is_dup)
